class.name: ARCollaborationData
class.brief_description: Collaboration data for multi-peer AR sessions.
class.description: Encapsulates spatial data that can be exchanged between devices for shared AR experiences. Received via the [signal ARSession.collaboration_data_received] signal and sent to peers via [method ARSession.update_with_collaboration_data]. Use [method serialize] and [method deserialize] to transmit over a network transport (e.g. MultipeerConnectivity). [b]iOS 13+ only.[/b] Requires [code]isCollaborationEnabled[/code] on the configuration. On visionOS/macOS, this type exists for API consistency but serialize/deserialize are no-ops.

method.name: deserialize
method.description: Creates an [ARCollaborationData] instance from serialized network data.

method.name: serialize
method.description: Serializes this collaboration packet into a [PackedByteArray] so it can be sent to another peer.

members.member: Indicates whether this collaboration packet is optional or critical to session convergence.

constants.constant: This packet is essential for accurate shared-session synchronization.
This packet improves shared-session quality but may be dropped if needed.
